song.title: Ye Must Be Born Again
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) A ruler once came To Jesus by night, To ask Him the way Of salvation and light; The Master made answer In words true and plain, “Ye must be born again!”
[C] Chorus “Ye must be born again!” “Ye must be born again!” “I verily, verily say unto thee, Ye must be born again!”
[V2] 2) Ye children of men, attuned to the word So solemnly uttered by Jesus, the Lord, And let not this message to you be in vain, “Ye must be born again!”
[V3] 3) Oh, ye who would enter That glorious rest, And sing with the ransomed The song of the blest; The life everlasting If ye would obtain, “Ye must be born again!”
song.author: William t. Sleeper
